intent_original: Estabeleça uma rota estática do roteador r1 para a rede do r4 usando o r0 como salto.

classificacao.name: static_route_setup
classificacao.rationale: Setting up a static route for the router r1 to connect to the network of router r4 using router r0 as a hop.

warnings: Missing destination network (dst_cidr) for r4 LAN. Provide the CIDR of the network behind r4 to install static routes via r0.

intent_original: Garanta que todos os hosts da sub-rede 10.1.0.0/24 consigam pingar o gateway 10.255.1.1.

classificacao.name: subnet-gateway-assignment
classificacao.rationale: Ensures that all hosts in the specified subnet can reach the designated gateway

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: end-to-end reachability validation / IP addressing not implemented (needs ping/route-probe ops).

intent_original: Configure o protocolo OSPF em todos os roteadores para vizinhança automática.

classificacao.name: configure-ospf-neighborship
classificacao.rationale: Configuração de configuração de rede

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: OSPF configuration not implemented (needs ospf ops).

intent_original: Remova a rota padrão do roteador r2 e aponte o tráfego de saída para a interface r2-eth0.

classificacao.name: removal_cleanup
classificacao.rationale: Intent to remove default route from router r2 and redirect outgoing traffic to interface r2-eth0

warnings: Assuming default route is 0.0.0.0/0. If your environment uses a different default route representation, adjust accordingly.

intent_original: Habilite o encaminhamento de pacotes IP no nó r3 para permitir trânsito entre s3 e r0.

classificacao.name: enable-traffic-routing
classificacao.rationale: Enabling traffic routing for specific nodes to allow communication between certain services

intent_original: Impeça que qualquer host conectado ao switch s1 acesse o servidor web em h41.

classificacao.name: access_server_web
classificacao.rationale: Request to configure access to server web for hosts connected to switch s1

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: L4/L7 access control to block HTTP to h41 is not supported (needs firewall rules by dst host/port).

intent_original: Crie uma zona isolada para o departamento financeiro (h21 e h22).

classificacao.name: create-isolation-zone
classificacao.rationale: Creating a isolated zone for the finance department

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Host isolation / segmentation not supported (needs ACL/VLAN/bridge-flow ops).

intent_original: Permita apenas tráfego SSH vindo de r1 para o roteador central r0.

classificacao.name: ssh-traffic-permission
classificacao.rationale: Allowing only SSH traffic from R1 to the central router R0

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: SSH-only policy not supported (needs firewall rule allow/deny by protocol/port and src/dst).

intent_original: Configure um firewall no r0 para descartar pacotes ICMP vindos da rede 10.3.0.0/24.

classificacao.name: configure_firewall
classificacao.rationale: Configuring a firewall to discard ICMP packets from the 10.3.0.0/24 network

intent_original: Isole o switch s4 de toda a topologia, exceto conexões do administrador.

classificacao.name: isolate_or_switch_s4
classificacao.rationale: Intent to isolate or switch S4 devices across the topology, excluding administrative connections.

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Switch isolation not supported (needs OpenFlow/ACL rules and definition of 'admin' sources).

intent_original: Mude o modo de operação dos switches para SDN usando OpenFlow 1.3.

classificacao.name: openflow-configuration
classificacao.rationale: Intent specifies a configuration change for OpenFlow protocol

warnings: Missing controller parameters (controller_ip, controller_port, bridge). Provide SDN controller endpoint and bridge name(s) to enable OpenFlow 1.3 on switches.

intent_original: Configure o controlador SDN no IP 192.168.56.101 para gerenciar o switch s2.

classificacao.name: configure-sdn-controller
classificacao.rationale: Intent especifica a configuração de um controlador SDN em uma IP específica

warnings: Missing parameters for ovs_set_controller: controller_port and bridge are required in CommandProfile. Provide controller_port and OVS bridge name on s2.

intent_original: Redirecione tráfego HTTP da rede 10.2.0.0 para passar pelo nó r0.

classificacao.name: redirect_http_traffic
classificacao.rationale: Redirecting HTTP traffic from subnet 10.2.0.0 to node r0

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: HTTP redirection / service chaining not supported (needs policy routing/NAT/proxy ops).

intent_original: Crie um caminho redundante entre r1 e r4 com baixa latência.

classificacao.name: create-redundant-path
classificacao.rationale: Intent relacionado a segurança, criando um caminho redundante para garantir disponibilidade

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Redundant low-latency path computation not supported (needs routing/TE ops and metrics).

intent_original: Limite a largura de banda da interface r1-eth1 para 10Mbps.

classificacao.name: set-bandwidth-limit
classificacao.rationale: Setting a specific bandwidth limit on an interface

intent_original: Verifique se existe algum loop de roteamento entre r1, r0 e r2.

classificacao.name: verify-routing-loop
classificacao.rationale: Checking for routing loops in a network configuration

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Routing-loop verification not implemented (needs route-table probe/traceroute ops).

intent_original: Monitore o uso de CPU de todos os roteadores FRR.

classificacao.name: cpu_usage_monitoring
classificacao.rationale: Monitoring CPU usage of all FRR routers

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: CPU monitoring not implemented (needs telemetry/CPU probe ops).

intent_original: Analise a tabela de rotas de r4 e confirme o caminho para a LAN do r3.

classificacao.name: configurar-rotas
classificacao.rationale: Intent relacionado à configuração de rotas de rede

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Route-table analysis not implemented (needs route-table probe ops).

intent_original: Simule uma falha no link r0-r1 e mostre o novo caminho de h11.

classificacao.name: simulate_failure
classificacao.rationale: Intent relacionado a simulação de falhas para testes de segurança

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Link-failure simulation not implemented (needs link toggle + path probe ops).

intent_original: Gere um relatório de inventário comparando a física com o arquivo JSON.

classificacao.name: gerar-relatorio-inventario
classificacao.rationale: Intent de criar um relatório de inventário, que é uma configuração de sistema

warnings: Unsupported operation in current CommandProfile: Inventory report not implemented (needs discovery probe ops and comparison logic).
